positive: Minimalist celestial forest silhouette scene. Highly detailed line art merged with abstract geometric flora and bioluminescent fauna. The main subject is a stylized, interlocking archway of glowing crystal roots supporting a crescent moon and scattered star constellations. Use a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient background contrasted by vibrant pops of neon emerald green and electric violet light sources. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, creating a strong, clean silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Crisp vector quality, strong contrast, negative space is a key design element. Hyper-detailed, elegant, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, realistic photography, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, ugly, badly drawn, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, messy lines
